Defines a `ResourceDeclaration` class for filesystem resources with only a name attribute.

# Purpose
The `ResourceDeclaration` class defines a simple data structure for representing resources with a name attribute. It is used to identify resources that exist on the filesystem at firmware compile time, without storing additional information about them. The class includes an [`__init__`](<#ResourceDeclaration__init__>) method that initializes the `name` attribute, which is the only piece of data associated with each resource. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on the declaration of resources by name.
